brain.commentary: The council leans bullish on core US equities and ETFs (AAPL, GOOGL, SPY, QQQ, DIA) with solid conviction and positive composites, supporting a modest risk‑on stance. However, several flat‑direction symbols show negative composites, weak alpha, and elevated volatility, making their signals fragile. These fragile symbols (MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, TSLA, META, BTC/USD, ETH/USD, SOL/USD, LTC/USD) receive modest downward adjustments to curb exposure. Overall exposure is nudged higher on the strongest equity longs while trimming the more uncertain positions.
